incentive_detail: The Canada Greener Homes Grant offers up to $5000 in rebates for eligible solar installations combined with Ontario's net metering program allowing surplus energy credits.
BC Hydro's net metering program credits solar customers at the full retail rate for surplus electricity fed back to the grid.
Alberta offers net metering and municipalities like Calgary provide additional rebates; high electricity rates make solar ROI especially strong.
Alberta's deregulated electricity market and net metering policy make solar highly attractive; Edmonton's cold-but-sunny climate is ideal for panel efficiency.
Hydro-Quebec's net metering program allows solar customers to bank credits; low electricity rates mean longer payback periods but rising costs improve future returns.
Ontario's net metering program combined with the federal Greener Homes Grant of up to $5000 makes solar installations financially viable for Ottawa homeowners.
